text: We assign a Hold rating to American Express Company (AXP) as of November 12, 2025. While the company demonstrates strong profitability metrics and has delivered record Q3 2025 results with lifted full-year guidance, revenue growth volatility and elevated financial leverage warrant a cautious stance. The stock's substantial year-to-date gain of 23.3% and recent surge to all-time highs suggest much of the positive momentum may already be reflected in the current valuation.
